gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the plants and updating the community app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and README up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Nomnom creature checking on a digital greenhouse. Polly holds a tiny clipboard checking off metrics, while Nomnom happily eats a stack of old metric reports. Lots of green code-plants and flowers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny clipboard, checking on a digital greenhouse full of blooming code-plants. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a stack of old metric reports. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
